meaning: n.<美口>无名小镇,偏僻小村
examples: If all I had was a newspaper in Podunk City, over the next ten years I would deteriorate.
But if I had a newspaper in Podunk City and full Internet technology and a radio and TV station, the combined entity would survive.
"It's very different in Podunk, Alabama, schools, where parents and coaches are less educated and more concerned about winning than safety for the children, " Hockman said.
